title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates!
